title: Kanjuro Draws a Way Up
description: Pages 1–5 focus on kanjuro draws a way up, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Kanjuro, Kinemon, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as kanjuro's drawings help the fighters climb the plateau, turning the absurd rescue into a practical route toward the palace.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The basement underneath the trade harbor

dialogue.speaker: Kanjuro
dialogue.text: Don't all climb up at once!!! Those drawn lad- DERS break easily!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kanjuro
dialogue.text: Why are all the lines drawn so crooked?! It's so hard to climb!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I don't wanna hear your problems, you impudent fools!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Now we can get back above ground!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Take control of this-!!! shoot to Ki-...

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: Wait!! If you guys all leave, we really wont be able to heal princess mansherry's sickness!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: With these "earplugs" I can't hear your lies anymore!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Get in touch with the young master!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Everyone!! Make sure they can't call in for reinforce-ments!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Return all those Dender- mushi back to the wild!!

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: This is awful, this is awful!! I really hope all that about PRIN- CESS mansherry's sickness was a lie!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: -But for now, she's crying for me!! She's crying out my name!! So I'm coming to save you!! ...princess....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Moussy!! There's Princess Mansherry's quarantine sickroom!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: BUT... There's a sign on it that says "Keep out"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: What did you say?! "Keep out"!!? Why didn't you tell me sooner!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: How am I supposed to slow down that fast??!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: WAAAAAH!! moussy broke down the "Keep out" door!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: How could you?! We didn't think you were that kind of a person!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: I mean, they wrote it right on the door! Not to come in!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: It's just an ordinary ware- house?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: This doesn't have anything to do with you... but... haah...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: In that back alley on the right just now... I saw...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: A frail old lady in need of help!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: ...Is that sooo-, well bring it on then ...

summary: Kanjuro Draws a Way Up develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Kanjuro, Kinemon, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
